name: Zhuzhou Times New Material Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Zhuzhou Times New Material Technology CO., LTD. develops, produces, and sells NVH components and polymer composite materials for the railway, automotive, construction, and wind power industries in China and internationally. The company offers railway products, such as primary suspension systems, secondary suspension systems, bushings, anti-roll bars, base plates, link systems, rubber layer springs, and draft gears; and automotive products, including lightweight products, chassis plastic structural components, body accessories, engine compartment plastic components, acoustic products, and AVS products. It also provides bridge and building bearings comprising rubber seismic mitigation and absorption series, high damping rubber bearings, vibration isolation rubber bearings, seismic isolation bearings for building, special bearing series, steel structure and engineering maintenance products, hyperboloid steel bearings, damper series, pot rubber bearings, waterstops, spherical steel bearings, and expansion joints; and wind power products consisting of blades and damping series. In addition, the company offers engineering plastic products, including new products, modified engineering plastic products, and engineering plastics; and insulating materials, such as mica products, laminated products, film products, magnetic wires, and insulating paints. Its products are used in various fields, such as railway and urban transportation, commercial vehicles, and passenger cars, as well as wind power, bridge and building constructions, engineering machinery, etc. The company was formerly known as Zhuzhou Times Rubber & Plastics CO., LTD. and changed its name to Zhuzhou Times New Material Technology CO., LTD. in November 2001. Zhuzhou Times New Material Technology CO., LTD. was founded in 1984 and is based in Zhuzhou, China.
